consolidated.headline: Quiet ~4.6h window since the last (monthly) report. System HEALTHY: clean coordinated restart at 12:09:52Z deployed b2b85f37, both services active, heartbeat live, VM relaxed (cpu 10%/mem 11%/disk 24%). ZERO closed trades real/paper/demo over 24h. Real money: flat, 0 open positions, lifetime -$26.03. Paper (isolated research book): 0 closed, 8 open, net unrealized ~-75 on measured legs (+1 unmeasured MHG), lifetime -$31,972 unchanged. ML fleet nominal — 26 shadow heads accruing, one advisory head (btc-regime-1h-lgbm-yz-v1) live. Markets calm: BTC +1.2%, MES +0.5%, MGC +0.7%.

operator_priorities.title: No action required this window

operator_priorities.title: Paper research book remains deeply negative (standing item)
operator_priorities.detail: Lifetime paper −$31,972 (isolated from real). Not new this window (0 trades). Tracked in the monthly report's strategy follow-ups; revisit on the next performance-review with trade flow.

cross_review_notes: Coordinated 12:09:52Z restart shows in health (uptime/git_sha) and explains the post-restart loaded_strategies=None snapshot value — strategies reload on the next ticks; last_tick is fresh so the pipeline recovered cleanly.

Zero trade flow in the window means performance has no dossiers to grade and the advisory ML head had no order to influence — a genuinely idle market window, not a plumbing stall (heartbeat + ticks confirm liveness).

Open paper book (no real exposure): biggest unrealized winner SOLUSDT long +$350, biggest loser AVAXUSDT short -$478. Two symbol pairs (XRPUSDT x2, ADAUSDT x2) each report IDENTICAL per-leg unrealized PnL across different entry/qty — likely a per-symbol broker-aggregate uPnL copied to each netted leg; paper-only, flagged as a minor data-quality note.
